name: Guillermo J. Montenegro
headline: Mobile, Web Full Stack, and AI Engineer with more than 15 years of experience
summary: Senior developer oriented to Mobile, Web Full Stack, and AI Engineer roles. I bring experience across Android and iOS mobile development, web development with React and Next.js, Python backend work, and integration of AI-based solutions. I adopted AI tools early as coding assistants and workflow accelerators, and that practice evolved into hands-on work with LLMs, agents, tool calling, prompting, and applied automation.

highlights: Contributed to the design and development of a business-oriented web application, from functional definition through delivery.
Worked as an AI Engineer, AI Researcher, and Senior Software Engineer in applied research involving LLMs, agents, and tool ecosystems.
Designed AI-assisted workflows and prototypes focused on model integration, orchestration, and deterministic behavior.
Implemented automation, internal tools, and engineering practices to strengthen development and operations cycles.

experience.role: Senior Full Stack Developer / AI Engineer
highlights: More than a decade of continuous work in mobile development across Android, iOS, and cross-platform technologies.
Designed and built mobile and web applications for corporate and research environments.
Integrated mobile apps, APIs, supporting backends, and related web frontends.
Performed AI Engineer work in the exploration, evaluation, and incorporation of AI tools for productivity, automation, and new development workflows.
Built scalable, maintainable solutions oriented toward real product operation.
Development of enterprise and mobile applications in C#, VB .NET, ASP .NET, Objective-C, Java, and JavaScript.
Worked on mobile games and apps such as Rescue me from Asylum, AfterLife Samurai, and DimBot Unit 12.
Used Xcode, Eclipse, Blender, Gimp, Unity Engine, and Zebra scripting.
Internal auditor and senior quality control professional.
Leadership of a junior auditors team.
Implementation and control of ISO standards in production processes.

projects: AIDZero: modular runtime for LLM agents in Python with tools and MCP gateway
Personal CV website and technical library built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
Native Android applications with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and maintainable architecture
iOS applications with Swift, UIKit, and SwiftUI
Web frontends with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Python backends and automation for AI and mobile/web products

education.title: Electrical Technician with a specialization in Industrial Electronics
